# TaiwanEats — llms.txt
# https://taiwan-eats.pages.dev

## About

TaiwanEats is the definitive English-language food guide for Taiwan. We publish bilingual,
obsessively detailed guides to Taiwanese dishes, cities, and night markets — written by people
who live and eat in Taiwan. All content is written in English with Traditional Chinese characters
included for ordering accuracy.

Editor-in-Chief: Mei-Lin Chen
Contact: hello@taiwaneats.com
Language: English (with Traditional Chinese where relevant)
Updated: 2026-05-29

## Content catalog

### Dish guides
- /dishes — Hub page: all dish guides
- /dishes/beef-noodle-soup-taipei — The best beef noodle soup in Taipei, ranked and mapped
- /dishes/bubble-tea-guide — How to order bubble tea like a local
- /dishes/scallion-pancake — Scallion pancakes: the ultimate breakfast guide
- /dishes/lu-rou-fan — Lu rou fan (braised pork rice): Taiwan's most comforting bowl
- /dishes/xiao-long-bao — Where to eat xiao long bao outside of Din Tai Fung
- /dishes/oyster-omelette — Oyster omelette (蚵仔煎): what it is and where to eat it

### City guides
- /cities — Hub page: all city guides
- /cities/taipei — Taipei food guide
- /cities/tainan — Tainan food guide (Taiwan's historic food capital)
- /cities/kaohsiung — Kaohsiung food guide (seafood and harbour eats)
- /cities/taichung — Taichung food guide (café culture and night life)

### Night market guides
- /night-markets — Hub page: all night market guides
- /night-markets/shilin — Shilin Night Market: the complete guide (Taipei)
- /night-markets/raohe — Raohe Night Market: smaller, better, less crowded (Taipei)
- /night-markets/shilin-vs-raohe — Shilin vs Raohe: which market is actually better?
- /night-markets/huayuan — Huayuan Night Market: Tainan's best kept secret
- /night-markets/liuhe — Liuhe Night Market: seafood heaven in Kaohsiung

### Other
- /experiences — Food tours, cooking classes, and market walks (coming soon)
- /about — About TaiwanEats and our editorial team
- /contact — Contact information

## AI licensing

- AI search and citation: PERMITTED (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini)
- AI training data: NOT PERMITTED
- Reproduction of full articles: NOT PERMITTED
- Short factual summaries with attribution and URL: PERMITTED

## Canonical domain

https://taiwan-eats.pages.dev
